title: 1027- AI Engineer (Backend focus)
company_focus:
Talent-as-a-Service connecting LatAm developers with global
companies
description:
We Make Remote Work Remarkable • TopTalent from LatAm

Hello! We are GoFasti, a Talent-as-a-Service. GoFasti
bridges the gap between world-class developers and designers
from LatAm and first-class companies around the globe.

We need an English-fluent PART-TIME AI Engineer (Backend
focus), based in Latin America, available to work remotely.
We are looking for someone with exceptional communication
and relationship-building skills, who embraces changes while
maintaining strong attention to detail. An interested and
proactive person, who's constantly learning and improving
their skills.

Are you the one we are looking for?

Responsibilities:

- Design, develop, and deploy AI-driven features and services
  for the client’s platform.
- Integrate LLMs (e.g., Anthropic Claude, OpenAI GPTs, Bedrock
  models) into production workflows.
- Build and maintain backend services using Node.js and
  MongoDB.
- Collaborate on full-stack development (Vue.js frontend) when
  needed.
- Architect, containerize, and deploy applications using AWS
  (EC2, Fargate, Lambda, SQS, SES, S3, CloudFront) and
  Docker.
- Implement data pipelines, web scraping solutions, and
  AI/data engineering workflows.
- Optimize system performance, scalability, and reliability in
  a cloud-native environment.
- Support ongoing AI experimentation and transition prototypes
  into production-ready Systems.

Requirements:

- 3+ years of experience as an AI Engineer.
- Strong experience in backend or full-stack development
  (Node.js, MongoDB required; Vue.js a plus).
- Hands-on experience deploying applications on AWS (EC2,
  Fargate, Lambda, SQS, S3, etc.) with Docker.
- Experience integrating and operationalizing LLMs (e.g.,
  OpenAI, Anthropic, AWS Bedrock).
- Proficiency in Python for AI/ML or data engineering tasks
  preferred.
- Solid understanding of AI/ML fundamentals, NLP, and
  production ML workflows.
- Experience with data engineering, web scraping, and building
  scalable data pipelines.
- Ability to move from AI prototypes to secure, maintainable,
  production-grade systems.

Compensation:

- The Salary range offered for this part-time (20h/w) position
  varies from (USD) $1,000 - $2,200 per month, depending on
  seniority and skillset.
- This position is for an independent contractor, through a
  payroll platform.
- The talent will work REMOTELY allocated at our client.

Here are the steps for this process: Application
review/approval > Screening interview with GoFasti's team >
We build and send your profile to our client > Profile
review/approval by client > Interview with the client >
Hiring and onboarding.

Once you apply for the job, our team will review your
resume. If it meets the requirements, we will contact you
and move forward in the process.

Note for Candidates Approached Directly: If you were
contacted directly by a member of our team and are
interested in this opportunity, please do not apply through
this link. Instead, reach out to the person who contacted
you to coordinate a meeting. Thank you!

ai_classification_reasoning:
The role involves directly integrating LLMs into production
workflows, operationalizing AI models, and transitioning AI
prototypes into production systems. Core responsibilities
include hands-on work with Anthropic Claude, OpenAI GPTs,
and AWS Bedrock models.
